description: Install dependencies and verify the project builds cleanly on the current main branch before making changes.
steps: Run `npm install` in osai-web/ to ensure all dependencies are available
Run `npm run typecheck` in osai-web/ and confirm it exits 0
Run `npm run build` in osai-web/ and confirm it exits 0
acceptance_criteria: npm run typecheck exits with code 0
npm run build exits with code 0
findings: All dependencies already up to date (147 packages). Typecheck and build both pass cleanly on the fix/ui-ux-audit-fixes branch. Next.js 16.2.7 with Turbopack. 22 static pages generated successfully.
